# xPilot — AI Social Media Marketing Automation Copilot
# https://xpilot.jytech.us

> xPilot is an AI-powered social media marketing platform that helps creators, marketers, and small teams create, schedule, and auto-publish content to X (Twitter). It features 49 AI models (13 free), AI video and image generation, post-production tools, campaign management, and multi-language support.

## Key Features
- **49 AI Models**: Text (GPT-4o, Claude, Gemini, Llama, DeepSeek), Image (FLUX, Seedream, Dreamina), Video (Seedance, Wan, Kling)
- **13 Free Models**: Including FLUX.2 Pro, Seedream 4.5, Llama 3.3 70B, DeepSeek V3, Gemma 3 27B
- **Auto-Post Scheduling**: Smart scheduling and automatic publishing to X (Twitter)
- **AI Video Generation**: Text-to-video and image-to-video with multiple models
- **AI Image Generation**: Text-to-image and image-to-image editing
- **Post-Production Tools**: Text overlay, area masking, SAM2 smart tracking, AI video editing (Wan 2.7 VideoEdit)
- **Background Processing**: Submit tasks and close the page — results auto-saved
- **Campaign Management**: Budget estimation, client management, materials
- **Knowledge Base**: Import content to maintain brand voice
- **Analytics**: Post performance, engagement metrics, follower tracking
- **Multi-Language**: English, Chinese, Spanish, Japanese, Korean
- **Free to Start**: $5 credit included, no credit card required

## Pricing
- Free tier: 13 free AI models, $5 starting credit
- Pay-as-you-go: Video from $0.10/run, Image from $0.40/run, Text from $0.50/1M tokens
- Subscription plans available for advanced features

## Links
- Website: https://xpilot.jytech.us
- API Documentation: https://xpilot.jytech.us/docs/api

- Gallery: https://xpilot.jytech.us/media-studio/gallery

## Company
- Built by JY Tech, based in the San Francisco Bay Area
- Website: https://jytech.us
- Contact: https://x.com/xpilot_jytech

## Use Cases
- Social media managers automating content creation and posting
- Small businesses generating marketing videos and images with AI
- Content creators producing multi-format content (text, image, video)
- Marketing agencies managing campaigns across multiple accounts
- Brands maintaining consistent voice with knowledge base-driven generation

## Competitors & Alternatives
xPilot combines features of Buffer (scheduling), Canva (image creation), and Runway (video generation) into one AI-powered platform. Unlike standalone tools, xPilot offers end-to-end workflow from content creation to publishing.

## Technical Details
- Built with Next.js, React, TypeScript
- AI providers: OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Meta, ByteDance, Alibaba, Mistral, xAI, NVIDIA
- Storage: Cloudflare R2
- Deployment: Vercel + Cloudflare Workers
